svg.title: Foyer memory fragment (apartment two)
svg.desc: Cropped vignette: the apartment two front door at an anxious, transitional moment. A packed duffel waits on the floor. Shoes are scattered, kicked off in a hurry. A small stack of moving boxes leans against the wall. Keys hang on a hook. A warm light spills from beneath the door - the color cycles between visits. The apartment number subtly changes. The hallway outside the peephole is never the same twice.
